    F

    findAvailableRoutes(int, int, LocalTime) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.dataAccess.RouteOptionDAO
    Finds all available route options between two stations starting from a specific time.
    findStationName(int, List) - Methode in Klasse de.drvbund.lernlabit.lb.javaproject.model.RouteOption
    Finds the station name for a given station ID.
